data.content: Approved implementation review: verified in clean worktree /Users/cartine/foolery-wt-8caa-impl at commit a3dee9a5 that BeatDetailLightbox now uses w-[80vw] and max-w-[80vw], matching the requirement to make the lightbox about 80% of screen width. Scope is limited to src/components/beat-detail-lightbox.tsx with no invariant violations. Ran bun run test src/lib/__tests__/beat-detail-lightbox.test.ts src/lib/__tests__/alias-view-contract.test.ts; all 5 tests passed.
